name: @lmthing/app-homes
description: lmthing.homes — an AI-assisted home finder, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + intake & scout spaces). Paste the alert emails and links you already get; agents clean every capture into one comparable record — true cost, real size, commute times — read the listing for what it hides, triangulate the fuzzed map pin, and rank everything by a taste model learned from your own saves and dismisses.
